sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available in sources

special_mechanics.name: Possession
special_mechanics.description: Player controls angel Bob who can possess the bodies of other characters to progress through the game. A halo appears over the possessed character's head. Bob can abandon possessed bodies, but if spotted will be attacked by enemies.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics overview but contains no quantitative physics parameters. Contemporary reviews mention 'awkward controls' but no precise movement metrics documented. Game uses motion-capture animation but animation framerates and physics values not specified in available documentation.
